name: The Body as Site: Cruelty, Hunger, and the Politics of Memory
description: The Body as Site: Cruelty, Hunger, and the Politics of Memory brings together Agustina Andreoletti and Mukesh Kulriya for a podcast conversation exploring how the body carries histories of violence, erasure, and resilience. The session reflects on the body as a living archive—residue and vibration—shaped by social, political, and institutional forces, yet still capable of […]
